---
title: "Integrated Horizon Scanning Sources"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    css: ../../www/styles.css
    toc: true
---

## Overview

The ALIGN Global Hub integrates structured data across pharmaceutical R&D, regulatory systems, procurement platforms, and policy frameworks. This document profiles the key databases that contribute to the Hub.

## Data Sources Integration Status

| Database | Domain | Scope | Status | Timeline |
|----------|--------|-------|--------|----------|
| Impact Global Health R&D tracker | R&D Funding | Global | Completed | — |
| MMV antimalarial pipeline | R&D Pipeline | Global | Completed | — |
| DNDi portfolio | R&D Portfolio | Global | Completed | — |
| FIND DxConnect Test Directory | Diagnostic directory | Global | Completed | — |
| Clinicaltrials.gov | Clinical Trials | Global | In-progress | Q2 2026 |
| AVAC clinical trials database | Clinical Trials | Global | In-progress | Q2 2026 |
| MPP LAPaL | Licensing | Global | In-progress | Q2 2026 |
| MPP MedsPaL | IP/Patents | Global | In-progress | Q2 2026 |
| WHO Prequalification list (PQ) | Pre-qualification | Global | Not started | Q3 2026 |
| Global EML | EML (Comparative) | Global |  | Q3 2026 |

## Database Profiles (Key Examples)

### Impact Global Health R&D Tracker

- **Function:** Tracks R&D funding for neglected diseases, including malaria, TB, and HIV.
- **Coverage:** Global.
- **Products:** 142 records.
- **URL:** [https://www.impactglobalhealth.org/data/infectious-disease](https://www.impactglobalhealth.org/data/infectious-disease){target="_blank"}
- **Profile:** Provides insights into funding commitments and developer landscapes for major infectious diseases.

### FIND DxConnect Test Directory

- **Function:** Comprehensive directory for global diagnostics.
- **Coverage:** Global.
- **Products:** 221 records.
- **URL:** [https://finddx.org/](https://finddx.org/){target="_blank"}
- **Profile:** Key source for point-of-care and laboratory-based diagnostic tools for HIV, TB, and malaria.

### MMV (Medicines for Malaria Venture) Pipeline

- **Function:** Tracks development of new antimalarial drugs.
- **Coverage:** Global.
- **Products:** 117 records.
- **URL:** [https://www.mmv.org/](https://www.mmv.org/){target="_blank"}
- **Profile:** High-quality data on the current state of clinical and preclinical antimalarial therapeutics.

### DNDi (Drugs for Neglected Diseases initiative) Portfolio

- **Function:** R&D portfolio for neglected diseases.
- **Coverage:** Global.
- **Products:** Various therapeutics.
- **URL:** [https://dndi.org/](https://dndi.org/){target="_blank"}
- **Profile:** Focuses on patient-centric drug development for diseases that primarily affect LMICs.

## Integration Methods

For technical details on how these databases are harmonized into a single registry, refer to the [Source Integration Methods](source_methods.html){target="_blank"}.
